description: A reference grouping for suppliers (commercial group, category, or parent organization) that suppliers are bucketed into for consolidated spend reporting, group-level terms, and supplier-base analytics. Maintained as master data with the group name as its natural key for bulk-import upsert.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Group Name
fields.validation: required; unique; natural key for bulk-import upsert (duplicates last-wins)
fields.purpose: The unique group name that suppliers reference and that consolidated spend/analytics group by; being the natural key lets the group be created/updated by name on bulk import without surrogate-id management.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.purpose: A human-readable note on what the group represents (category scope, parent entity) so users picking a group in the supplier form understand its meaning.

invariants: A13 audit (category SUPPLIER) + SSE on every change
